'''Argor''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] and a [[Lesser Prophet]] of the Dark Side, one of the [[Prophets of the Dark Side|Emperor's Mages]] at the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="Rebellion Era Sourcebook" />

==Biography==
Unlike many higher-ranking Prophets who stayed on [[Coruscant/Legends|Imperial Center]] and [[Dromund Kaas/Legends|Dromund Kaas]], Argor served as a field agent of the [[Prophets of the Dark Side]], foiling [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] activity in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="Rebellion Era Sourcebook" />

{{Char-stub}}
